name: Hungarian Omelette.
recipeIngredient: Quarter of a small red pepper, de-seeded and sliced
Chopped fresh parsley or chives for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 teaspoon olive oil in a saucepan and sauté the onion and pepper gently until soft.
2. Add the tomatoes and paprika to the pan. Cook gently for an additional five minutes, or until the mixture is soft and pulpy. Season with salt as needed.
3. Heat the remaining oil in an omelette pan. Beat 2 tablespoons water into the eggs to lighten the mixture, then use it to make an omelette.
4. Fill the omelette with the tomato mixture and serve sprinkled with chopped parsley or chives.
Preparation time: 5 minutes
Cooking time: 15 minutes
